title: Academic Career Milestones
summary: Key appointments and achievements in academic career

entries.title: Joined UT Austin as Assistant Professor
entries.summary: Appointment to Department of Geography and the Environment, founding SEAI Lab.

entries.title: NSF Grant Award
entries.summary: $300,000 research grant for geographic bias in AI models.

entries.title: AAG Nystrom Award
entries.summary: Recognition for research on polygonal geometry representation learning.

entries.title: Joined UGA as Assistant Professor
entries.summary: First faculty position at University of Georgia Geography.

entries.title: Completed Ph.D. at UCSB
entries.summary: Ph.D. in Geography with emphasis in Cognitive Science.
